text: Ravi — you see that new NEJM piece this morning? The REDUCE-IT follow-up data. Reshaping how I'm thinking about high-risk secondary prevention post-PCI.
Just pulled it up. The residual risk reduction numbers are hard to ignore. Gonna change some conversations in clinic this week.
Exactly. Also caught the FL governor's press conf — apparently Jacksonville's getting that new cardiac imaging center downtown. Supposedly Q1 2027.
I heard rumors but didn't know it was confirmed. That'll help with our volume backlog, honestly. Chen's been drowning in stress echo referrals.
Sarah mentioned that Friday. She's got a 3-week wait right now. Unacceptable for chest pain workups.
Agreed. On a lighter note — did you see Jaguars apparently signed that tackle? Karen must be relieved you have football season to look forward to again 😄
Kyle's already texting me about season tickets. I told him let's see how training camp goes first. Not burning that money on optimism.
Ha. Sound advice from a man who stress-tests for a living. See you at grand rounds Thursday.
Did you see Ravi's post about the Jacksonville Heart Walk? Should we comment or just like it 😄
Kyle did you see Coach Mendez posted that highlight reel from your sophomore season? Might be worth a comment, dude played a huge role for you 🏀
Emily just saw your post — did you tag Karen or is this a surprise for her? Your mom has been dropping hints about that restaurant for weeks 😄
Mom, Barbara's post about her trip — just drop a 'Looks amazing! 😊' and you're done. You don't need three sentences, I promise.
Ravi, saw Chen's post about the ACC symposium recap — left a comment but worth you replying too. She put in real work pulling that together 👍
Sarah, did you see Ravi's post about the ACC guidelines update? Left a comment — told him Jacksonville's ahead of the curve. Classic Hussain, always fishing for engagement 😄
Saw Marcus's post about the half marathon — had to share it with Karen, she's been on me to sign up for the Jax River Run. Couldn't resist dropping a comment about my own 6am miles 😄
Saw Mike's post about the Jags game — had to drop a 🔥 on that one. We need to catch a home game this season, been too long since we were both in Jacksonville for one.
James — saw your LinkedIn post on the FFR-guided PCI data. Had Ravi pull it up between cases this morning. Good stuff, aligns with what we've been seeing at Coastal.
Priya — saw your post on the ACC thread about cath lab throughput. Shared it with Ravi, he's already drafting a response 😄 Good stuff, worth the wider debate.
Phase III transect logged; sending raw counts.
Cetirizine taken — vog spike incoming.
